reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar para cargar combustible (buen precio). Comer algo y tomar café.
Todo el personal es cordial y atento. Recomendable!

(Translated by Google)
A good place to fill up with gas (good price). Grab a bite to eat and have coffee.
All the staff are friendly and helpful. Highly recommended!
